mapper.select: SELECT * FROM compare_task ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO compare_task ( repo_id, repo_name, baseline_branch, target_branches, mr_selections, mode, context_ids, webhook_id, status, error_message, progress_total, progress_done, progress_phase, created_at, started_at, finished_at ) VALUES ( #{repoId}, #{repoName}, #{baselineBranch}, #{targetBranches}, #{mrSelections}, #{mode}, #{contextIds}, #{webhookId}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{progressTotal}, #{progressDone}, #{progressPhase}, #{createdAt}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE compare_task SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, progress_total = #{progressTotal}, progress_done = #{progressDone}, progress_phase = #{progressPhase}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
